nodes.title: Style Prompt
widgets_values: Clean smooth black outlines, soft cel shading, bright vivid saturated colors matching the reference, full body, centered, plain solid-color background, soft even lighting.

nodes.title: South Prompt
widgets_values: View: a symmetrical, dead-on front view facing the viewer — an orthographic character-turnaround front pose, body squared to the camera. The brain head is seen from the front; both eyes are in view, level and centered low on the front of the brain. The deep central groove that divides the two hemispheres runs straight down the vertical midline of the brain, splitting it into symmetric left and right halves. The body faces forward, both stub arms at the sides, the front of the clothing visible, both shoes seen from the front and side by side.

nodes.title: South East Prompt
widgets_values: View: a three-quarter front view, the character turned about 45 degrees to face toward the lower-right of the frame — halfway between the front view and the right side profile, an orthographic character-turnaround three-quarter front pose, head and face angled toward the lower right. Both eyes are in view, the near eye larger and the far eye foreshortened. The deep central groove that divides the two hemispheres runs down the front of the brain but off-center, shifted toward the near side and curving up over the crown, so the near hemisphere reads larger than the far one. The near arm is full and forward; the far arm recedes behind the torso with just its edge showing. The legs angle toward the right, both shoes pointing toward the lower right, the far shoe partly behind the near one.

nodes.title: East Prompt
widgets_values: View: a clean full-body side profile, the whole character turned 90 degrees to face the right edge of the frame — the side-on orientation a character has when facing right in a 2D side-scrolling platformer, standing still and upright with legs straight and together. The brain head is shown in pure lateral profile: a single hemisphere fills the head silhouette, presenting one rounded lobe of folds, with the deep central groove that divides the two halves running along the top of the head and away from the camera, out of view. Exactly one eye is visible, on the side facing us. The body is fully sideways, chest toward the right edge, one stub arm at the near side, the near leg overlapping the far leg, both shoes seen edge-on with the toes pointing right.

nodes.title: North East Prompt
widgets_values: View: a three-quarter back view, the character turned to face mostly away and toward the right edge of the frame — halfway between the back view and the right side profile, an orthographic character-turnaround three-quarter back pose. The rounded rear of the brain head is toward the viewer and the face is turned away to the far side. The deep central groove that divides the two hemispheres runs down the back of the brain but off-center, shifted toward the near side and curving up over the crown. The back of the body and clothing is in view; the near arm shows at its side and the far arm is tucked behind the torso. The legs angle toward the right, the shoes seen from behind and the side with the heels showing, toes pointing away to the right.

nodes.title: North Prompt
widgets_values: View: a symmetrical back view, the whole character turned 180 degrees to face directly away — an orthographic character-turnaround back pose. The smooth rounded rear of the brain head faces the viewer and the face is turned fully away. The deep central groove that divides the two hemispheres runs straight down the vertical midline of the back of the brain, splitting it into symmetric left and right halves. The back of the body and clothing is in view, both stub arms at the sides, both shoes seen from behind with the heels and soles showing, toes pointing away, symmetrical down the center line.

nodes.title: Identity Prompt
widgets_values:
Edit the reference image to re-pose the same character. Preserve the character's identity exactly as in the reference: {identity}.

The character holds the exact same neutral standing pose in every direction — standing upright and still, weight even on both feet, legs straight and together, both stub arms relaxed at the sides. Only the facing direction changes; the pose never changes.

Character type: a humanoid figure whose head is a single oversized glossy wrinkled brain on a short brain-stem neck, with a small slim lanky body, thin stub arms, and exaggerated big-head tiny-body proportions.
